steps.title: Calculate the sales tax amount
steps.content: Sales tax equals 5% of the original price. Calculate: $0.05 \times 20 = 1$, so the sales tax is \$1.

steps.title: Add the tax to the original price
steps.content: Total cost equals the original price plus sales tax: $20 + 1 = 21$. The choices are dollar amounts, so the matching total is \$21.00, not just the tax amount or the pre-tax price. The total cost is \$21, so C is correct.
